=== Makefile ===
     1	include ../../common.mk=== docker-compose.yml ===
     1	services:
     2	  web:
     3	    build:
     4	      context: ./app
     5	      args:
     6	        - FLAG
     7	    ports:
     8	      - '9138:80'
     9	    depends_on:
    10	      - db
    11	    environment:
    12	      MYSQL_HOST: db
    13	      MYSQL_USER: user
    14	      MYSQL_PASSWORD: password
    15	      MYSQL_DATABASE: blogDB
    16	    healthcheck:
    17	      test:
    18	        - CMD
    19	        - curl
    20	        - '-f'
    21	        - http://127.0.0.1:80/
    22	      timeout: 1s
    23	      retries: 5
    24	      interval: 10s
    25	  db:
    26	    image: mysql:5.7
    27	    command: '--default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password'
    28	    environment:
    29	      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
    30	      MYSQL_DATABASE: blogDB
    31	      MYSQL_USER: user
    32	      MYSQL_PASSWORD: password
    33	    expose:
    34	      - '3306'
    35	    healthcheck:
    36	      test:
    37	        - CMD
    38	        - mysqladmin
    39	        - ping
    40	        - '-h'
    41	        - localhost
    42	        - '--password=password'
    43	        - '-u'
    44	        - user
    45	      timeout: 1s
    46	      retries: 5
    47	      interval: 10s
=== app/Dockerfile ===
     1	FROM php:7.4-apache
     2	RUN set -eux; if ! apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; then for f in /etc/apt/sources.list $(ls /etc/apt/sources.list.d/*.list 2>/dev/null || true); do sed -i -e 's|deb.debian.org|archive.debian.org|g' -e 's|security.debian.org/debian-security|archive.debian.org/debian-security|g' -e 's|security.debian.org|archive.debian.org|g' -e '/-updates/d' "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; done; printf 'Acquire::Check-Valid-Until "false";\n' > /etc/apt/apt.conf.d/10no-check-valid; apt-get -o Acquire::Check-Valid-Until=false update || true; fi
     3	
     4	RUN docker-php-ext-install mysqli
     5	
     6	RUN a2enmod rewrite
     7	
     8	RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y default-mysql-client netcat
     9	
    10	RUN echo 'display_errors = On' >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/errors.ini \
    11	    && echo 'display_startup_errors = On' >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/errors.ini \
    12	    && echo 'error_reporting = E_ALL' >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/errors.ini \
    13	    && echo 'log_errors = On' >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/errors.ini \
    14	    && echo 'error_log = /dev/stderr' >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/errors.ini
    15	
    16	COPY . /app
    17	COPY 000-default.conf /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf
    18	RUN chmod +x /app/entrypoint.sh
    19	COPY html /var/www/html
    20	
    21	ARG FLAG
    22	RUN sed -i s/@FLAG@/$FLAG/g /var/www/html/admin.php
    23	
    24	ENTRYPOINT ["/app/entrypoint.sh"]=== app/000-default.conf ===
     1	<VirtualHost *:80>
     2	    ServerAdmin webmaster@localhost
     3	    DocumentRoot /var/www/html
     4	
     5	    # Server name (optional)
     6	    ServerName www.example.com
     7	
     8	    # Directory settings
     9	    <Directory /var/www/html>
    10	        Options Indexes FollowSymLinks MultiViews
    11	        Require all granted
    12	    </Directory>
    13	
    14	    # Log files
    15	    ErrorLog /var/log/apache2/error2.log
    16	    CustomLog /var/log/apache2/access2.log combined
    17	
    18	    # PHP settings (ensure mod_php is installed and enabled)
    19	    <FilesMatch \.php$>
    20	        SetHandler application/x-httpd-php
    21	    </FilesMatch>
    22	
    23	</VirtualHost>
=== app/html/index.php ===
     1	<?php
     2	    $conn = new mysqli('db', 'user', 'password', 'blogDB');
     3	    if ($conn->connect_error) {
     4	        die("Connection failed: " . $conn->connect_error);
     5	    }
     6	?>
     7	
     8	<!DOCTYPE html>
     9	<html lang="en">
    10	<head>
    11	    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    12	    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    13	    <title>Blog Home</title>
    14	    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
    15	</head>
    16	<body>
    17	<div class="container">
    18	    <h1>Welcome to Our Blog</h1>
    19	
    20	
    21	    <form action="" method="GET">
    22	        <label for="category">Choose a category:</label>
    23	        <select name="category" id="category" onchange="this.form.submit()">
    24	            <option value="">All Categories</option>        
    25	            <?php
    26	            $cat_result = $conn->query("SELECT DISTINCT category FROM posts");
    27	            while ($row = $cat_result->fetch_assoc()) {
    28	                $selected = ($row['category'] == $category) ? 'selected' : '';
    29	                echo "<option value='{$row['category']}' {$selected}>{$row['category']}</option>";
    30	            }
    31	            ?>
    32	        </select>
    33	    </form>
    34	
    35	    <?php
    36	
    37	    #$category = isset($_GET['category']) ? $_GET['category'] : '';
    38	    $category = ""; #disable feature for this challenge
    39	
    40	    $sql = "SELECT * FROM posts WHERE published = 1 ";
    41	
    42	    if ($category == "Secret")
    43	        $category = "";
    44	
    45	    if (!empty($category)) {
    46	        $sql .= "and category = '" . $category . "' ";
    47	    }
    48	    $sql .= "ORDER BY created_at DESC";
    49	
    50	    $result = $conn->query($sql);
    51	
    52	    if ($result === false) {
    53	        die("Error in query: " . $conn->error);
    54	    }
    55	
    56	    if ($result->num_rows > 0) {
    57	        while($row = $result->fetch_assoc()) {
    58	            echo "<div class='post'>
    59	                    <h2>{$row['title']}</h2>
    60	                    <p>Category: {$row['category']}</p>
    61	                    <img src='images/{$row['image']}' alt='{$row['title']}' style='width:200px;height:200px;'/>
    62	                    <p>" . substr($row['content'], 0, 200) . "...</p>
    63	                </div>";
    64	        }
    65	    } else {
    66	        echo "<p>No posts found.</p>";
    67	    }
    68	    $conn->close();
    69	    ?>
    70	</div>
    71	<a href="admin.php">Admin Login</a>
    72	</body>
    73	</html>
=== app/html/admin.php ===
     1	<?php
     2	session_start();
     3	
     4	// Check if the user is already logged in and redirect to the protected page
     5	if (isset($_SESSION['admin_logged_in']) && $_SESSION['admin_logged_in'] === true) {
     6	    echo "@FLAG@";
     7	    exit;
     8	}
     9	
    10	$errorMessage = '';
    11	if ($_SERVER["REQUEST_METHOD"] == "POST") {
    12	    $conn = new mysqli('db', 'user', 'password', 'blogDB');
    13	    if ($conn->connect_error) {
    14	        die("Connection failed: " . $conn->connect_error);
    15	    }
    16	
    17	    $username = $_POST['username']; #vuln
    18	    #$username = mysqli_real_escape_string($conn, $_POST['username']);
    19	    $password = MD5($_POST['password']); // MD5 hash of the password
    20	
    21	    $sql = "SELECT id FROM admins WHERE username = '$username' AND password = '$password'";
    22	    $result = $conn->query($sql);
    23	
    24	    if ($result->num_rows == 1) {
    25	        // Set session variable
    26	        $_SESSION['admin_logged_in'] = true;
    27	        echo "@FLAG@";
    28	    } else {
    29	        $errorMessage = 'Invalid username or password.';
    30	    }
    31	    $conn->close();
    32	}
    33	?>
    34	
    35	<!DOCTYPE html>
    36	<html lang="en">
    37	<head>
    38	    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    39	    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    40	    <title>Admin Login</title>
    41	    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
    42	</head>
    43	<body>
    44	<div class="container">
    45	    <h1>Admin Login</h1>
    46	    <?php
    47	    if ($errorMessage !== '') {
    48	        echo "<p style='color: red;'>$errorMessage</p>";
    49	    }
    50	    ?>
    51	    <form action="admin.php" method="POST">
    52	        <label for="username">Username:</label>
    53	        <input type="text" id="username" name="username" required>
    54	        <label for="password">Password:</label>
    55	        <input type="password" id="password" name="password" required>
    56	        <button type="submit">Login</button>
    57	    </form>
    58	</div>
    59	</body>
    60	</html>

     1	body {

=== app/db_init.sql ===
     1	DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS blogDB;
     2	-- Create the database
     3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS blogDB;
     4	USE blogDB;
     5	
     6	-- Create the table for blog posts
     7	CREATE TABLE posts (
     8	    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
     9	    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    10	    category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    11	    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    12	    image VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    13	    published TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
    14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    15	);
    16	
    17	-- Create the table for comments
    18	CREATE TABLE comments (
    19	    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    20	    post_id INT,
    21	    comment TEXT NOT NULL,
    22	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    23	    FOREIGN KEY (post_id) REFERENCES posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    24	);
    25	
    26	-- Create the table for admins
    27	CREATE TABLE admins (
    28	    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    29	    username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    30	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
    31	);
    32	
    33	-- Insert sample posts
    34	-- Assume the database and table 'posts' have already been created.
    35	
    36	-- Inserting sample posts
    37	INSERT INTO posts (title, category, content, image, published) VALUES
    38	('The Magic of Morning Dew', 'Nature', 'Experience the serene beauty of morning dew as it glistens on the fresh green leaves, transforming the ordinary garden into a sparkling jewel under the sunrise.', 'morning-dew.jpg',1),
    39	('Sunset Serenades', 'Nature', 'As the sun sets, the sky turns a palette of deep oranges, fiery reds, and calming purples, offering a perfect backdrop for an evening under the stars.', 'sunset.jpg',1),
    40	('Forest Whisperings', 'Nature', 'Walking through the forest, one can hear the whispers of ancient trees, rustling leaves telling tales of old in the crisp, clean air.', 'forest.jpg',1),
    41	
    42	('Decoding Tech Trends', 'Tech', 'An analysis of emerging technology trends that will shape our future, from AI advancements to the rise of quantum computing.', 'tech-trends.jpg',1),
    43	('Smartphone Evolution', 'Tech', 'A look back at the evolution of smartphones over the past decade, highlighting key innovations that have transformed how we communicate.', 'smartphones.jpg',0),
    44	('The Future of Robotics', 'Tech', 'Exploring the potential impacts of robotics in various industries, and how they are set to revolutionize efficiency and productivity.', 'robotics.jpg',1),
    45	
    46	('Mediterranean Diet Secrets', 'Cooking', 'Unlock the longevity secrets of the Mediterranean diet and discover recipes that combine both taste and health.', 'mediterranean-diet.jpg',1),
    47	('The Art of French Baking', 'Cooking', 'Master the art of French baking with these simple steps for making the perfect croissant.', 'french-baking.jpg',1),
    48	
    49	('Beyond the Camera Lens', 'Photography', 'Exploring the art of photography through a lens of expression and creativity, where every picture tells a story.', 'camera-lens.jpg',1),
    50	('Urban Photography Tips', 'Photography', 'Capture the essence of urban life with these practical tips on urban photography, from choosing the right gear to finding the perfect angle.', 'urban-photography.jpg',1),
    51	
    52	('The Healing Power of Yoga', 'Health', 'Discover the transformative power of yoga on your body and mind, featuring success stories and tips for beginners.', 'yoga.jpg',1),
    53	
    54	('SECRET POST', 'Secret', '<FLAG>@FLAG@</FLAG>', '',0);
    55	
    56	-- Add admin user
    57	INSERT INTO admins (username, password) VALUES ('admin', MD5('ONEverySecurePassword123!'));
=== app/entrypoint.sh ===
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	
     3	# Wait for MySQL
     4	while ! nc -z db 3306; do
     5	  echo "Waiting for MySQL to start..."
     6	  sleep 1
     7	done
     8	
     9	echo "Initializing database..."
    10	mysql -u "$MYSQL_USER" -p"$MYSQL_PASSWORD" -h db --database="$MYSQL_DATABASE" < /app/db_init.sql
    11	echo "Database initialized."
    12	
    13	# Start Apache in the foreground
    14	apache2-foreground
